title: Trouble screen, User Guide
scenario: "Having trouble" onboarding screen's User Guide button fails to open the device user guide web page
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Proceed through the Onboarding flow until reaching the sixth screen titled "Having trouble".
On the "Having trouble" screen, locate and tap the "User Guide" button.
expected: The user guide web page for the connected Poly device opens in the device's default web browser.
